title: AppEvent enum missing #[non_exhaustive]
description: If jmap-chat-egui is ever used as a library crate, adding a new AppEvent variant (e.g. TypingIndicator, PresenceUpdate) is a semver-breaking change for any downstream match site. The enum is pub with no #[non_exhaustive] annotation, contrary to the project rule in CLAUDE.md that spec-mirroring enums use #[non_exhaustive]. — Maintenance consequence: every new JMAP Chat SSE event type added to the spec requires a major version bump or breaks callers.
